description:
Files: src/ir_codegen.rs, runtime/src/ir_runtime.rs

9a — Declare FZ_SHOULD_YIELD as JIT import global:
  module.declare_data("FZ_SHOULD_YIELD", Linkage::Import, false, false)

9b — Inline check at is_back_edge sites (native Tail-CC path only):
  gv   = global_value.i64 %fz_should_yield_data
  flag = load.i8 notrap aligned gv+0
  brz  flag, $fast
  ; slow path: coerce args to Tagged, store to mid_flight_roots via fz_mid_flight_roots_ptr()
  ; call fz_yield_back_edge(fn_id, n), return YIELD_PTR (1i64)
  $fast: return_call callee(args...)
Uniform fns ignore is_back_edge.

9c — Resume shim per back-edge function:
  fz_resume_back_edge_fn{id}(): () -> i64, SystemV
  loads mid_flight_roots via fz_mid_flight_roots_ptr(), coerces Tagged→param reprs, return_call fn body
Store in CompiledModule::back_edge_resume_shims: HashMap<u32, *const u8>

9d — run_quantum: before existing dispatch checks:
  Proactive shrinkage: if last_gc_live_bytes>0 && bytes_used()<last_gc_live_bytes/2, increment quiet_quanta; at 3, FZ_SHOULD_YIELD.store(1), reset counter.
  Mid-flight resume: if mid_flight_fn_id!=0: gc_mid_flight if should_gc(), clear fn_id THEN call shim, park_time_gc, return.

Tests: self-recursive fn has shim in back_edge_resume_shims; CLIF contains global_value+load.i8+brz at back-edge block. Mutual recursion: both shims present. Proactive: quiet_quanta reaches 3 and sets FZ_SHOULD_YIELD.
title: fz-sched.9: JIT back-edge check, resume shim, run_quantum dispatch, proactive shrinkage
